mapper.sql: select product_id, product_code, product_name, currency, card_theme, risk_tag, single_rate, group_rate, cycle_days, interest_mode, principal_mode, interest_stage_count, principal_stage_count, stage_config_json, min_invest_amount, max_invest_amount, total_shares, sold_shares, point_per_unit, growth_per_unit, red_packet_per_unit, coupon_enabled, group_enabled, group_size, auto_group, limit_level, limit_times, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_invest_product
mapper.insert: insert into sys_invest_product(product_code, product_name, currency, card_theme, risk_tag, single_rate, group_rate, cycle_days, interest_mode, principal_mode, interest_stage_count, principal_stage_count, stage_config_json, min_invest_amount, max_invest_amount, total_shares, sold_shares, point_per_unit, growth_per_unit, red_packet_per_unit, coupon_enabled, group_enabled, group_size, auto_group, limit_level, limit_times, status, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{currency}, #{cardTheme}, #{riskTag}, #{singleRate}, #{groupRate}, #{cycleDays}, #{interestMode}, #{principalMode}, #{interestStageCount}, #{principalStageCount}, #{stageConfigJson}, #{minInvestAmount}, #{maxInvestAmount}, #{totalShares}, #{soldShares}, #{pointPerUnit}, #{growthPerUnit}, #{redPacketPerUnit}, #{couponEnabled}, #{groupEnabled}, #{groupSize}, #{autoGroup}, #{limitLevel}, #{limitTimes}, #{status}, #{params.startTime}, #{params.endTime}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_invest_product where product_id in
#{productId}
mapper.select: select tag_id from sys_invest_product_tag_rel where product_id = #{productId}
